_comment: Local registry fixture manifest (Phase 21). Source of truth for the fake registry served by the in-process fixture server (tests/lisp/install/registry-fixture). The .tgz bytes under tarballs/ are the source of truth for dist.integrity: the server computes sha512 from the real bytes at startup and templates dist.tarball to its own base URL. Rebuild tarballs with scripts/gen-registry-fixture.sh. Package set exercises: plain multi-version resolution (left-pad), a scoped package needing %2F encoding (@scope/widget), a bin-bearing package (hasbin), a diamond version conflict that forces nesting (conflict-a/conflict-b both depend on incompatible shared), and a pax-longname tarball (longname-pkg: an internal path over ustar's 100-byte name field — Phase-22 reader material).
